product_overview: A public marketing landing site for Mamak Games combined with a built-in admin CMS that lets the studio owner manage all site content — games, hero, about, services, contact, legal, and footer — without code changes.
core_goals: Allow visitors to discover the studio and browse published games, view game details, and find contact information.
Let visitors send messages via a public contact form that stores submissions for admin review.
Enable the studio admin to onboard (first-time setup), authenticate, and manage all public content (hero, about, services, games, contact info, footer, legal, SEO) via a protected admin dashboard.
Provide lightweight content publishing controls (publish/unpublish, feature) for games and visibility toggles across site sections.

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public single-page experience presenting hero, animated games showcase, about, services, contact form, and footer.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through page sections -> Open a game's detail from the games showcase -> View game cover, genre, release date and available store links -> Scroll to contact section -> View contact information and social links
Navigate to / -> Use header menu to jump to #games -> Scroll gallery to discover multiple published games

features.name: Contact Form (Public)
features.description: Public contact form on the landing page to submit project inquiries which are persisted for admin review.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Go to contact section -> Fill name input -> Fill email input -> Select project type from dropdown -> Fill message textarea -> Submit contact form -> See success feedback
Navigate to / -> Go to contact section -> Fill name input -> Fill invalid email -> Fill message textarea -> Submit contact form -> See validation error message

features.name: Admin Setup Wizard
features.description: First-time bootstrap to create the initial admin user and seed required singleton content rows.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/setup -> Fill admin email input -> Fill admin password input -> Submit create admin account -> See success message and get redirected to /admin/login

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Credentials-based admin sign-in to access protected CMS routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Get redirected to /admin
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email input with invalid credentials -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Overview page showing site metrics and quick navigation to management pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View total games count -> View published games count -> View submissions count and unread submissions count -> Use quick link to navigate to /admin/games

features.name: Site Settings Management
features.description: Edit global site settings including logo text, optional loading screen, and SEO meta fields.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings -> Edit logo text input -> Edit loading screen text input -> Toggle show loading screen checkbox -> Edit SEO meta title -> Edit SEO meta description -> Save changes -> See success toast

features.name: Hero Section Management
features.description: Edit hero tagline, title, highlight word, subtitle and primary/secondary CTAs and visibility.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/hero -> Edit tagline input -> Edit title input -> Edit highlight word input -> Edit subtitle textarea -> Edit primary CTA text and link -> Edit secondary CTA text and link -> Toggle hero visibility -> Save changes -> See success feedback

features.name: About Section Management
features.description: Edit studio description, founder information and key stats displayed in the about section.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/about -> Edit description textarea -> Edit founder name, role and bio -> Edit three stat labels and values -> Toggle about section visibility -> Save changes -> See success feedback

features.name: Services Management
features.description: Create, edit, reorder and remove service offerings with icon selection and visibility control.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/services -> Select icon from dropdown -> Fill title input -> Fill description textarea -> Fill sort order number -> Toggle visibility -> Add service -> See new service listed
Navigate to /admin/services -> Open existing service for edit -> Update title and description -> Save changes -> See updated service in list
Navigate to /admin/services -> Open existing service for edit -> Delete service with confirmation -> See service removed from the list

features.name: Games Management
features.description: Full CRUD for the game catalog, including publish/feature toggles, cover and store links.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/games -> Use quick action to go to /admin/games/new -> Fill game title input -> Fill slug input -> Fill description textarea -> Select genre -> Fill release date -> Add cover image URL -> Add store URLs for App Store, Google Play, Web or Steam -> Toggle featured status -> Toggle published status -> Save game -> Navigate back to /admin/games -> See new game listed
Navigate to /admin/games -> Open an existing game from the list to edit details -> Update description or store URLs -> Save changes -> See updated game in list
Navigate to /admin/games -> Toggle published status on a listed game -> See published status update in the list
Navigate to /admin/games -> Delete a listed game and confirm deletion -> See game removed from the list

features.name: Contact Info Management
features.description: Edit public contact details and the contact CTA that appear on the landing page.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/contact -> Edit email input -> Edit phone input -> Edit location input -> Edit availability input -> Edit CTA text and link -> Toggle contact visibility -> Save changes -> See success feedback

features.name: Footer and Social Links Management
features.description: Manage footer text, copyright and social media links displayed site-wide.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/footer -> Edit footer description textarea -> Edit copyright text -> Add social link by specifying platform and URL -> Save changes -> See new social link in the list
Navigate to /admin/footer -> Select existing social link -> Delete social link -> Save changes -> See social link removed

features.name: Legal Pages Management
features.description: Edit HTML content for privacy policy and terms of service and preview public pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/legal -> Edit privacy policy HTML textarea -> Save Privacy Policy -> Navigate to /privacy-policy -> Preview updated privacy policy
Navigate to /admin/legal -> Edit terms of service HTML textarea -> Save Terms -> Navigate to /terms-of-service -> Preview updated terms of service

features.name: Contact Form Submissions (Admin)
features.description: Inbox for viewing, marking read and deleting contact form submissions sent by visitors.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/submissions -> View list of submissions with name, email and message -> Mark a submission as read -> See submission marked as read
Navigate to /admin/submissions -> Delete a submission -> Confirm deletion -> See submission removed from the inbox

routes.description: Landing page with hero, games, about, services, contact sections
Admin dashboard with stats and quick links
Privacy policy and terms of service editing

known_limitations.issue: Hero section intentionally uses canvas particle animation instead of a background image. Test expectations expecting a static image will fail.
known_limitations.impact: visual test mismatch for hero background image check
